# Generated by tools/generate_pp_goods_output_map_modes.py - do not edit by hand.
# Traffic-light heatmap: raw = local output x market_access; per-good buckets calibrated from output artifacts.
# Locations with zero local output of the good get no overlay (terrain); sea/unowned stay grey.

@zoom_step_near = 2
@data_gradient_alpha_inside = 1
@data_gradient_alpha_outside = 1
@data_gradient_width = 0.25
@data_gradient_color_mult = 0.9
@data_edge_width = 0
@data_edge_sharpness = 0.01
@data_edge_alpha = 0
@data_edge_color_mult = 0
@data_before_lighting_blend = 0.5
@data_after_lighting_blend = 0.5

pp_alum_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:alum)" > 0
				pp_alum_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_alum_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:alum)" > 0
				pp_alum_output_raw < 3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_alum_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:alum)" > 0
				pp_alum_output_raw < 13
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_alum_output_raw
					subtract = 3
					divide = 10
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:alum)" > 0
				pp_alum_output_raw < 38
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_alum_output_raw
					subtract = 13
					divide = 25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:alum)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_ALUM_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_ALUM_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_ALUM_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_ALUM_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_ALUM_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_ALUM_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_ALUM_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_amber_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:amber)" > 0
				pp_amber_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_amber_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:amber)" > 0
				pp_amber_output_raw < 3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_amber_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:amber)" > 0
				pp_amber_output_raw < 10
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_amber_output_raw
					subtract = 3
					divide = 7
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:amber)" > 0
				pp_amber_output_raw < 30
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_amber_output_raw
					subtract = 10
					divide = 20
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:amber)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_AMBER_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_AMBER_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_AMBER_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_AMBER_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_AMBER_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_AMBER_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_AMBER_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_beer_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:beer)" > 0
				pp_beer_output_raw < 0.11
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_beer_output_raw
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:beer)" > 0
				pp_beer_output_raw < 0.32
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_beer_output_raw
					subtract = 0.11
					divide = 0.21
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:beer)" > 0
				pp_beer_output_raw < 0.53
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_beer_output_raw
					subtract = 0.32
					divide = 0.21
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:beer)" > 0
				pp_beer_output_raw < 2.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_beer_output_raw
					subtract = 0.53
					divide = 1.97
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:beer)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_BEER_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_BEER_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_BEER_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_BEER_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_BEER_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_BEER_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_BEER_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_beeswax_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:beeswax)" > 0
				pp_beeswax_output_raw < 1.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_beeswax_output_raw
					divide = 1.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:beeswax)" > 0
				pp_beeswax_output_raw < 4.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_beeswax_output_raw
					subtract = 1.5
					divide = 3
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:beeswax)" > 0
				pp_beeswax_output_raw < 11
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_beeswax_output_raw
					subtract = 4.5
					divide = 6.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:beeswax)" > 0
				pp_beeswax_output_raw < 45
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_beeswax_output_raw
					subtract = 11
					divide = 34
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:beeswax)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_BEESWAX_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_BEESWAX_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_BEESWAX_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_BEESWAX_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_BEESWAX_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_BEESWAX_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_BEESWAX_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_books_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:books)" > 0
				pp_books_output_raw < 0.03
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_books_output_raw
					divide = 0.03
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:books)" > 0
				pp_books_output_raw < 0.09
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_books_output_raw
					subtract = 0.03
					divide = 0.06
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:books)" > 0
				pp_books_output_raw < 0.15
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_books_output_raw
					subtract = 0.09
					divide = 0.06
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:books)" > 0
				pp_books_output_raw < 0.8
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_books_output_raw
					subtract = 0.15
					divide = 0.65
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:books)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_BOOKS_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_BOOKS_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_BOOKS_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_BOOKS_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_BOOKS_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_BOOKS_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_BOOKS_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_cannons_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:cannons)" > 0
				pp_cannons_output_raw < 0.12
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_cannons_output_raw
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:cannons)" > 0
				pp_cannons_output_raw < 0.22
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_cannons_output_raw
					subtract = 0.12
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:cannons)" > 0
				pp_cannons_output_raw < 0.26
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_cannons_output_raw
					subtract = 0.22
					divide = 0.04
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:cannons)" > 0
				pp_cannons_output_raw < 0.8
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_cannons_output_raw
					subtract = 0.26
					divide = 0.54
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:cannons)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_CANNONS_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_CANNONS_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_CANNONS_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_CANNONS_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_CANNONS_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_CANNONS_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_CANNONS_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_chili_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:chili)" > 0
				pp_chili_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_chili_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:chili)" > 0
				pp_chili_output_raw < 1.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_chili_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 0.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:chili)" > 0
				pp_chili_output_raw < 3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_chili_output_raw
					subtract = 1.5
					divide = 1.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:chili)" > 0
				pp_chili_output_raw < 8.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_chili_output_raw
					subtract = 3
					divide = 5.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:chili)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_CHILI_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_CHILI_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_CHILI_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_CHILI_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_CHILI_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_CHILI_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_CHILI_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_clay_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:clay)" > 0
				pp_clay_output_raw < 0.3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_clay_output_raw
					divide = 0.3
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:clay)" > 0
				pp_clay_output_raw < 1.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_clay_output_raw
					subtract = 0.3
					divide = 1.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:clay)" > 0
				pp_clay_output_raw < 12
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_clay_output_raw
					subtract = 1.5
					divide = 10.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:clay)" > 0
				pp_clay_output_raw < 49
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_clay_output_raw
					subtract = 12
					divide = 37
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:clay)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_CLAY_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_CLAY_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_CLAY_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_CLAY_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_CLAY_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_CLAY_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_CLAY_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_cloth_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:cloth)" > 0
				pp_cloth_output_raw < 0.2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_cloth_output_raw
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:cloth)" > 0
				pp_cloth_output_raw < 0.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_cloth_output_raw
					subtract = 0.2
					divide = 0.3
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:cloth)" > 0
				pp_cloth_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_cloth_output_raw
					subtract = 0.5
					divide = 0.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:cloth)" > 0
				pp_cloth_output_raw < 3.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_cloth_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 2.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:cloth)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_CLOTH_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_CLOTH_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_CLOTH_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_CLOTH_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_CLOTH_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_CLOTH_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_CLOTH_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_cloves_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:cloves)" > 0
				pp_cloves_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_cloves_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:cloves)" > 0
				pp_cloves_output_raw < 3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_cloves_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:cloves)" > 0
				pp_cloves_output_raw < 5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_cloves_output_raw
					subtract = 3
					divide = 2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:cloves)" > 0
				pp_cloves_output_raw < 9.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_cloves_output_raw
					subtract = 5
					divide = 4.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:cloves)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_CLOVES_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_CLOVES_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_CLOVES_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_CLOVES_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_CLOVES_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_CLOVES_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_CLOVES_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_coal_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:coal)" > 0
				pp_coal_output_raw < 0.8
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_coal_output_raw
					divide = 0.8
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:coal)" > 0
				pp_coal_output_raw < 2.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_coal_output_raw
					subtract = 0.8
					divide = 1.7
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:coal)" > 0
				pp_coal_output_raw < 5.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_coal_output_raw
					subtract = 2.5
					divide = 3
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:coal)" > 0
				pp_coal_output_raw < 14
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_coal_output_raw
					subtract = 5.5
					divide = 8.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:coal)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_COAL_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_COAL_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_COAL_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_COAL_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_COAL_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_COAL_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_COAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_cocoa_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:cocoa)" > 0
				pp_cocoa_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_cocoa_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:cocoa)" > 0
				pp_cocoa_output_raw < 1.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_cocoa_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 0.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:cocoa)" > 0
				pp_cocoa_output_raw < 2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_cocoa_output_raw
					subtract = 1.5
					divide = 0.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:cocoa)" > 0
				pp_cocoa_output_raw < 4.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_cocoa_output_raw
					subtract = 2
					divide = 2.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:cocoa)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_COCOA_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_COCOA_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_COCOA_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_COCOA_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_COCOA_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_COCOA_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_COCOA_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_coffee_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:coffee)" > 0
				pp_coffee_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_coffee_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:coffee)" > 0
				pp_coffee_output_raw < 2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_coffee_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:coffee)" > 0
				pp_coffee_output_raw < 3.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_coffee_output_raw
					subtract = 2
					divide = 1.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:coffee)" > 0
				pp_coffee_output_raw < 5.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_coffee_output_raw
					subtract = 3.5
					divide = 2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:coffee)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_COFFEE_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_COFFEE_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_COFFEE_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_COFFEE_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_COFFEE_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_COFFEE_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_COFFEE_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_copper_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:copper)" > 0
				pp_copper_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_copper_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:copper)" > 0
				pp_copper_output_raw < 1.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_copper_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 0.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:copper)" > 0
				pp_copper_output_raw < 15
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_copper_output_raw
					subtract = 1.5
					divide = 13.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:copper)" > 0
				pp_copper_output_raw < 97
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_copper_output_raw
					subtract = 15
					divide = 82
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:copper)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_COPPER_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_COPPER_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_COPPER_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_COPPER_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_COPPER_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_COPPER_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_COPPER_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_cotton_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:cotton)" > 0
				pp_cotton_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_cotton_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:cotton)" > 0
				pp_cotton_output_raw < 1.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_cotton_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 0.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:cotton)" > 0
				pp_cotton_output_raw < 3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_cotton_output_raw
					subtract = 1.5
					divide = 1.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:cotton)" > 0
				pp_cotton_output_raw < 9
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_cotton_output_raw
					subtract = 3
					divide = 6
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:cotton)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_COTTON_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_COTTON_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_COTTON_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_COTTON_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_COTTON_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_COTTON_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_COTTON_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_dyes_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:dyes)" > 0
				pp_dyes_output_raw < 0.03
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_dyes_output_raw
					divide = 0.03
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:dyes)" > 0
				pp_dyes_output_raw < 0.07
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_dyes_output_raw
					subtract = 0.03
					divide = 0.04
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:dyes)" > 0
				pp_dyes_output_raw < 0.32
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_dyes_output_raw
					subtract = 0.07
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:dyes)" > 0
				pp_dyes_output_raw < 5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_dyes_output_raw
					subtract = 0.32
					divide = 4.68
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:dyes)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_DYES_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_DYES_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_DYES_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_DYES_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_DYES_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_DYES_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_DYES_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_elephants_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:elephants)" > 0
				pp_elephants_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_elephants_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:elephants)" > 0
				pp_elephants_output_raw < 2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_elephants_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:elephants)" > 0
				pp_elephants_output_raw < 3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_elephants_output_raw
					subtract = 2
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:elephants)" > 0
				pp_elephants_output_raw < 4
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_elephants_output_raw
					subtract = 3
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:elephants)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_ELEPHANTS_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_ELEPHANTS_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_ELEPHANTS_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_ELEPHANTS_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_ELEPHANTS_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_ELEPHANTS_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_ELEPHANTS_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_fiber_crops_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:fiber_crops)" > 0
				pp_fiber_crops_output_raw < 1.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_fiber_crops_output_raw
					divide = 1.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:fiber_crops)" > 0
				pp_fiber_crops_output_raw < 2.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_fiber_crops_output_raw
					subtract = 1.5
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:fiber_crops)" > 0
				pp_fiber_crops_output_raw < 5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_fiber_crops_output_raw
					subtract = 2.5
					divide = 2.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:fiber_crops)" > 0
				pp_fiber_crops_output_raw < 10
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_fiber_crops_output_raw
					subtract = 5
					divide = 5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:fiber_crops)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FIBER_CROPS_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FIBER_CROPS_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FIBER_CROPS_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FIBER_CROPS_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FIBER_CROPS_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_FIBER_CROPS_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_FIBER_CROPS_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_fine_cloth_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:fine_cloth)" > 0
				pp_fine_cloth_output_raw < 0.07
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_fine_cloth_output_raw
					divide = 0.07
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:fine_cloth)" > 0
				pp_fine_cloth_output_raw < 0.14
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_fine_cloth_output_raw
					subtract = 0.07
					divide = 0.07
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:fine_cloth)" > 0
				pp_fine_cloth_output_raw < 0.21
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_fine_cloth_output_raw
					subtract = 0.14
					divide = 0.07
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:fine_cloth)" > 0
				pp_fine_cloth_output_raw < 0.91
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_fine_cloth_output_raw
					subtract = 0.21
					divide = 0.7
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:fine_cloth)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FINE_CLOTH_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FINE_CLOTH_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FINE_CLOTH_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FINE_CLOTH_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FINE_CLOTH_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_FINE_CLOTH_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_FINE_CLOTH_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_firearms_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:firearms)" > 0
				pp_firearms_output_raw < 0.12
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_firearms_output_raw
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:firearms)" > 0
				pp_firearms_output_raw < 0.24
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_firearms_output_raw
					subtract = 0.12
					divide = 0.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:firearms)" > 0
				pp_firearms_output_raw < 0.4
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_firearms_output_raw
					subtract = 0.24
					divide = 0.16
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:firearms)" > 0
				pp_firearms_output_raw < 1.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_firearms_output_raw
					subtract = 0.4
					divide = 1.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:firearms)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FIREARMS_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FIREARMS_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FIREARMS_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FIREARMS_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FIREARMS_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_FIREARMS_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_FIREARMS_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_fish_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:fish)" > 0
				pp_fish_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_fish_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:fish)" > 0
				pp_fish_output_raw < 8.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_fish_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 7.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:fish)" > 0
				pp_fish_output_raw < 11
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_fish_output_raw
					subtract = 8.5
					divide = 2.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:fish)" > 0
				pp_fish_output_raw < 210
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_fish_output_raw
					subtract = 11
					divide = 199
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:fish)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FISH_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FISH_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FISH_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FISH_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FISH_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_FISH_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_FISH_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_fruit_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:fruit)" > 0
				pp_fruit_output_raw < 1.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_fruit_output_raw
					divide = 1.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:fruit)" > 0
				pp_fruit_output_raw < 5.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_fruit_output_raw
					subtract = 1.5
					divide = 4
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:fruit)" > 0
				pp_fruit_output_raw < 17
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_fruit_output_raw
					subtract = 5.5
					divide = 11.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:fruit)" > 0
				pp_fruit_output_raw < 270
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_fruit_output_raw
					subtract = 17
					divide = 253
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:fruit)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FRUIT_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FRUIT_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FRUIT_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FRUIT_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FRUIT_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_FRUIT_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_FRUIT_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_fur_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:fur)" > 0
				pp_fur_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_fur_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:fur)" > 0
				pp_fur_output_raw < 1.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_fur_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 0.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:fur)" > 0
				pp_fur_output_raw < 2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_fur_output_raw
					subtract = 1.5
					divide = 0.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:fur)" > 0
				pp_fur_output_raw < 36
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_fur_output_raw
					subtract = 2
					divide = 34
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:fur)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FUR_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FUR_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FUR_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FUR_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FUR_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
