		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_FUR_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_FUR_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_furniture_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:furniture)" > 0
				pp_furniture_output_raw < 0.1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_furniture_output_raw
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:furniture)" > 0
				pp_furniture_output_raw < 0.2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_furniture_output_raw
					subtract = 0.1
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:furniture)" > 0
				pp_furniture_output_raw < 0.33
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_furniture_output_raw
					subtract = 0.2
					divide = 0.13
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:furniture)" > 0
				pp_furniture_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_furniture_output_raw
					subtract = 0.33
					divide = 0.67
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:furniture)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FURNITURE_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FURNITURE_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FURNITURE_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FURNITURE_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FURNITURE_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_FURNITURE_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_FURNITURE_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_gems_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:gems)" > 0
				pp_gems_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_gems_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:gems)" > 0
				pp_gems_output_raw < 1.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_gems_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 0.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:gems)" > 0
				pp_gems_output_raw < 5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_gems_output_raw
					subtract = 1.5
					divide = 3.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:gems)" > 0
				pp_gems_output_raw < 67
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_gems_output_raw
					subtract = 5
					divide = 62
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:gems)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_GEMS_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_GEMS_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_GEMS_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_GEMS_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_GEMS_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_GEMS_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_GEMS_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_glass_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:glass)" > 0
				pp_glass_output_raw < 0.1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_glass_output_raw
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:glass)" > 0
				pp_glass_output_raw < 0.2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_glass_output_raw
					subtract = 0.1
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:glass)" > 0
				pp_glass_output_raw < 0.31
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_glass_output_raw
					subtract = 0.2
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:glass)" > 0
				pp_glass_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_glass_output_raw
					subtract = 0.31
					divide = 0.69
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:glass)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_GLASS_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_GLASS_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_GLASS_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_GLASS_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_GLASS_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_GLASS_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_GLASS_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_goods_gold_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:goods_gold)" > 0
				pp_goods_gold_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_goods_gold_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:goods_gold)" > 0
				pp_goods_gold_output_raw < 1.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_goods_gold_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 0.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:goods_gold)" > 0
				pp_goods_gold_output_raw < 8.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_goods_gold_output_raw
					subtract = 1.5
					divide = 7
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:goods_gold)" > 0
				pp_goods_gold_output_raw < 57
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_goods_gold_output_raw
					subtract = 8.5
					divide = 48.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:goods_gold)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_GOODS_GOLD_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_GOODS_GOLD_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_GOODS_GOLD_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_GOODS_GOLD_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_GOODS_GOLD_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_GOODS_GOLD_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_GOODS_GOLD_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_horses_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:horses)" > 0
				pp_horses_output_raw < 2.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_horses_output_raw
					divide = 2.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:horses)" > 0
				pp_horses_output_raw < 3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_horses_output_raw
					subtract = 2.5
					divide = 0.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:horses)" > 0
				pp_horses_output_raw < 8.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_horses_output_raw
					subtract = 3
					divide = 5.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:horses)" > 0
				pp_horses_output_raw < 23
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_horses_output_raw
					subtract = 8.5
					divide = 14.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:horses)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_HORSES_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_HORSES_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_HORSES_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_HORSES_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_HORSES_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_HORSES_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_HORSES_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_incense_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:incense)" > 0
				pp_incense_output_raw < 0.8
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_incense_output_raw
					divide = 0.8
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:incense)" > 0
				pp_incense_output_raw < 6
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_incense_output_raw
					subtract = 0.8
					divide = 5.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:incense)" > 0
				pp_incense_output_raw < 16
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_incense_output_raw
					subtract = 6
					divide = 10
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:incense)" > 0
				pp_incense_output_raw < 26
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_incense_output_raw
					subtract = 16
					divide = 10
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:incense)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_INCENSE_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_INCENSE_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_INCENSE_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_INCENSE_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_INCENSE_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_INCENSE_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_INCENSE_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_iron_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:iron)" > 0
				pp_iron_output_raw < 0.36
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_iron_output_raw
					divide = 0.36
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:iron)" > 0
				pp_iron_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_iron_output_raw
					subtract = 0.36
					divide = 0.64
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:iron)" > 0
				pp_iron_output_raw < 3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_iron_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:iron)" > 0
				pp_iron_output_raw < 38
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_iron_output_raw
					subtract = 3
					divide = 35
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:iron)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_IRON_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_IRON_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_IRON_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_IRON_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_IRON_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_IRON_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_IRON_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_ivory_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:ivory)" > 0
				pp_ivory_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_ivory_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:ivory)" > 0
				pp_ivory_output_raw < 1.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_ivory_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 0.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:ivory)" > 0
				pp_ivory_output_raw < 2.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_ivory_output_raw
					subtract = 1.5
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:ivory)" > 0
				pp_ivory_output_raw < 35
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_ivory_output_raw
					subtract = 2.5
					divide = 32.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:ivory)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_IVORY_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_IVORY_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_IVORY_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_IVORY_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_IVORY_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_IVORY_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_IVORY_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_jewelry_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:jewelry)" > 0
				pp_jewelry_output_raw < 0.11
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_jewelry_output_raw
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:jewelry)" > 0
				pp_jewelry_output_raw < 0.22
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_jewelry_output_raw
					subtract = 0.11
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:jewelry)" > 0
				pp_jewelry_output_raw < 0.88
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_jewelry_output_raw
					subtract = 0.22
					divide = 0.66
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:jewelry)" > 0
				pp_jewelry_output_raw < 2.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_jewelry_output_raw
					subtract = 0.88
					divide = 1.62
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:jewelry)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_JEWELRY_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_JEWELRY_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_JEWELRY_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_JEWELRY_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_JEWELRY_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_JEWELRY_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_JEWELRY_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_lacquerware_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:lacquerware)" > 0
				pp_lacquerware_output_raw < 0.04
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_lacquerware_output_raw
					divide = 0.04
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:lacquerware)" > 0
				pp_lacquerware_output_raw < 0.1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_lacquerware_output_raw
					subtract = 0.04
					divide = 0.06
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:lacquerware)" > 0
				pp_lacquerware_output_raw < 0.4
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_lacquerware_output_raw
					subtract = 0.1
					divide = 0.3
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:lacquerware)" > 0
				pp_lacquerware_output_raw < 2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_lacquerware_output_raw
					subtract = 0.4
					divide = 1.6
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:lacquerware)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LACQUERWARE_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LACQUERWARE_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LACQUERWARE_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LACQUERWARE_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LACQUERWARE_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_LACQUERWARE_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_LACQUERWARE_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_lead_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:lead)" > 0
				pp_lead_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_lead_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:lead)" > 0
				pp_lead_output_raw < 5.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_lead_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 4.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:lead)" > 0
				pp_lead_output_raw < 18
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_lead_output_raw
					subtract = 5.5
					divide = 12.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:lead)" > 0
				pp_lead_output_raw < 57
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_lead_output_raw
					subtract = 18
					divide = 39
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:lead)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LEAD_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LEAD_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LEAD_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LEAD_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LEAD_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_LEAD_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_LEAD_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_leather_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:leather)" > 0
				pp_leather_output_raw < 0.2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_leather_output_raw
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:leather)" > 0
				pp_leather_output_raw < 0.6
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_leather_output_raw
					subtract = 0.2
					divide = 0.4
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:leather)" > 0
				pp_leather_output_raw < 2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_leather_output_raw
					subtract = 0.6
					divide = 1.4
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:leather)" > 0
				pp_leather_output_raw < 11
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_leather_output_raw
					subtract = 2
					divide = 9
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:leather)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LEATHER_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LEATHER_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LEATHER_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LEATHER_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LEATHER_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_LEATHER_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_LEATHER_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_legumes_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:legumes)" > 0
				pp_legumes_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_legumes_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:legumes)" > 0
				pp_legumes_output_raw < 2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_legumes_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:legumes)" > 0
				pp_legumes_output_raw < 8.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_legumes_output_raw
					subtract = 2
					divide = 6.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:legumes)" > 0
				pp_legumes_output_raw < 230
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_legumes_output_raw
					subtract = 8.5
					divide = 221.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:legumes)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LEGUMES_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LEGUMES_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LEGUMES_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LEGUMES_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LEGUMES_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_LEGUMES_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_LEGUMES_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_liquor_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:liquor)" > 0
				pp_liquor_output_raw < 0.1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_liquor_output_raw
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:liquor)" > 0
				pp_liquor_output_raw < 0.2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_liquor_output_raw
					subtract = 0.1
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:liquor)" > 0
				pp_liquor_output_raw < 0.4
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_liquor_output_raw
					subtract = 0.2
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:liquor)" > 0
				pp_liquor_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_liquor_output_raw
					subtract = 0.4
					divide = 0.6
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:liquor)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LIQUOR_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LIQUOR_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LIQUOR_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LIQUOR_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LIQUOR_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_LIQUOR_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_LIQUOR_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_livestock_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:livestock)" > 0
				pp_livestock_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_livestock_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:livestock)" > 0
				pp_livestock_output_raw < 2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_livestock_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:livestock)" > 0
				pp_livestock_output_raw < 8
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_livestock_output_raw
					subtract = 2
					divide = 6
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:livestock)" > 0
				pp_livestock_output_raw < 34
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_livestock_output_raw
					subtract = 8
					divide = 26
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:livestock)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LIVESTOCK_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LIVESTOCK_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LIVESTOCK_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LIVESTOCK_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LIVESTOCK_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_LIVESTOCK_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_LIVESTOCK_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_lumber_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:lumber)" > 0
				pp_lumber_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_lumber_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:lumber)" > 0
				pp_lumber_output_raw < 2.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_lumber_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 1.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:lumber)" > 0
				pp_lumber_output_raw < 19
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_lumber_output_raw
					subtract = 2.5
					divide = 16.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:lumber)" > 0
				pp_lumber_output_raw < 130
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_lumber_output_raw
					subtract = 19
					divide = 111
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:lumber)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LUMBER_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LUMBER_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LUMBER_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LUMBER_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LUMBER_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_LUMBER_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_LUMBER_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_maize_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:maize)" > 0
				pp_maize_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_maize_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:maize)" > 0
				pp_maize_output_raw < 1.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_maize_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 0.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:maize)" > 0
				pp_maize_output_raw < 12
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_maize_output_raw
					subtract = 1.5
					divide = 10.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:maize)" > 0
				pp_maize_output_raw < 320
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_maize_output_raw
					subtract = 12
					divide = 308
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:maize)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MAIZE_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MAIZE_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MAIZE_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MAIZE_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MAIZE_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_MAIZE_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_MAIZE_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_marble_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:marble)" > 0
				pp_marble_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_marble_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:marble)" > 0
				pp_marble_output_raw < 1.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_marble_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 0.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:marble)" > 0
				pp_marble_output_raw < 3.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_marble_output_raw
					subtract = 1.5
					divide = 2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:marble)" > 0
				pp_marble_output_raw < 6.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_marble_output_raw
					subtract = 3.5
					divide = 3
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:marble)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MARBLE_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MARBLE_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MARBLE_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MARBLE_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MARBLE_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_MARBLE_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_MARBLE_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_masonry_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:masonry)" > 0
				pp_masonry_output_raw < 0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_masonry_output_raw
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:masonry)" > 0
				pp_masonry_output_raw < 0.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_masonry_output_raw
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:masonry)" > 0
				pp_masonry_output_raw < 0.53
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_masonry_output_raw
					subtract = 0.5
					divide = 0.03
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:masonry)" > 0
				pp_masonry_output_raw < 2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_masonry_output_raw
					subtract = 0.53
					divide = 1.47
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:masonry)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MASONRY_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MASONRY_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MASONRY_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MASONRY_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MASONRY_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_MASONRY_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_MASONRY_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_medicaments_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:medicaments)" > 0
				pp_medicaments_output_raw < 0.05
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_medicaments_output_raw
					divide = 0.05
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:medicaments)" > 0
				pp_medicaments_output_raw < 0.1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_medicaments_output_raw
					subtract = 0.05
					divide = 0.05
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:medicaments)" > 0
				pp_medicaments_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_medicaments_output_raw
					subtract = 0.1
					divide = 0.9
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:medicaments)" > 0
				pp_medicaments_output_raw < 3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_medicaments_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:medicaments)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MEDICAMENTS_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MEDICAMENTS_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MEDICAMENTS_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MEDICAMENTS_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MEDICAMENTS_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_MEDICAMENTS_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_MEDICAMENTS_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_mercury_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:mercury)" > 0
				pp_mercury_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_mercury_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:mercury)" > 0
				pp_mercury_output_raw < 2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_mercury_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:mercury)" > 0
				pp_mercury_output_raw < 6.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_mercury_output_raw
					subtract = 2
					divide = 4.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:mercury)" > 0
				pp_mercury_output_raw < 34
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_mercury_output_raw
					subtract = 6.5
					divide = 27.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:mercury)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MERCURY_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MERCURY_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MERCURY_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MERCURY_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MERCURY_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_MERCURY_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_MERCURY_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_millet_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:millet)" > 0
				pp_millet_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_millet_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:millet)" > 0
				pp_millet_output_raw < 2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_millet_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:millet)" > 0
				pp_millet_output_raw < 16
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_millet_output_raw
					subtract = 2
					divide = 14
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:millet)" > 0
				pp_millet_output_raw < 290
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_millet_output_raw
					subtract = 16
					divide = 274
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:millet)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MILLET_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MILLET_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MILLET_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MILLET_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MILLET_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_MILLET_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_MILLET_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_naval_supplies_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:naval_supplies)" > 0
				pp_naval_supplies_output_raw < 0.1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_naval_supplies_output_raw
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:naval_supplies)" > 0
				pp_naval_supplies_output_raw < 0.15
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_naval_supplies_output_raw
					subtract = 0.1
					divide = 0.05
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:naval_supplies)" > 0
				pp_naval_supplies_output_raw < 0.21
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_naval_supplies_output_raw
					subtract = 0.15
					divide = 0.06
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:naval_supplies)" > 0
