				pp_naval_supplies_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_naval_supplies_output_raw
					subtract = 0.21
					divide = 0.79
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:naval_supplies)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_NAVAL_SUPPLIES_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_NAVAL_SUPPLIES_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_NAVAL_SUPPLIES_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_NAVAL_SUPPLIES_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_NAVAL_SUPPLIES_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_NAVAL_SUPPLIES_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_NAVAL_SUPPLIES_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_olives_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:olives)" > 0
				pp_olives_output_raw < 2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_olives_output_raw
					divide = 2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:olives)" > 0
				pp_olives_output_raw < 76
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_olives_output_raw
					subtract = 2
					divide = 74
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:olives)" > 0
				pp_olives_output_raw < 210
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_olives_output_raw
					subtract = 76
					divide = 134
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:olives)" > 0
				pp_olives_output_raw < 630
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_olives_output_raw
					subtract = 210
					divide = 420
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:olives)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_OLIVES_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_OLIVES_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_OLIVES_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_OLIVES_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_OLIVES_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_OLIVES_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_OLIVES_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_paper_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:paper)" > 0
				pp_paper_output_raw < 0.11
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_paper_output_raw
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:paper)" > 0
				pp_paper_output_raw < 0.22
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_paper_output_raw
					subtract = 0.11
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:paper)" > 0
				pp_paper_output_raw < 0.55
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_paper_output_raw
					subtract = 0.22
					divide = 0.33
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:paper)" > 0
				pp_paper_output_raw < 2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_paper_output_raw
					subtract = 0.55
					divide = 1.45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:paper)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_PAPER_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_PAPER_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_PAPER_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_PAPER_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_PAPER_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_PAPER_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_PAPER_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_pearls_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:pearls)" > 0
				pp_pearls_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_pearls_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:pearls)" > 0
				pp_pearls_output_raw < 3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_pearls_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:pearls)" > 0
				pp_pearls_output_raw < 13
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_pearls_output_raw
					subtract = 3
					divide = 10
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:pearls)" > 0
				pp_pearls_output_raw < 33
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_pearls_output_raw
					subtract = 13
					divide = 20
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:pearls)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_PEARLS_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_PEARLS_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_PEARLS_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_PEARLS_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_PEARLS_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_PEARLS_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_PEARLS_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_pepper_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:pepper)" > 0
				pp_pepper_output_raw < 2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_pepper_output_raw
					divide = 2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:pepper)" > 0
				pp_pepper_output_raw < 4
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_pepper_output_raw
					subtract = 2
					divide = 2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:pepper)" > 0
				pp_pepper_output_raw < 7
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_pepper_output_raw
					subtract = 4
					divide = 3
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:pepper)" > 0
				pp_pepper_output_raw < 12
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_pepper_output_raw
					subtract = 7
					divide = 5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:pepper)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_PEPPER_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_PEPPER_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_PEPPER_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_PEPPER_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_PEPPER_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_PEPPER_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_PEPPER_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_porcelain_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:porcelain)" > 0
				pp_porcelain_output_raw < 0.1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_porcelain_output_raw
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:porcelain)" > 0
				pp_porcelain_output_raw < 0.16
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_porcelain_output_raw
					subtract = 0.1
					divide = 0.06
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:porcelain)" > 0
				pp_porcelain_output_raw < 0.2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_porcelain_output_raw
					subtract = 0.16
					divide = 0.04
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:porcelain)" > 0
				pp_porcelain_output_raw < 0.4
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_porcelain_output_raw
					subtract = 0.2
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:porcelain)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_PORCELAIN_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_PORCELAIN_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_PORCELAIN_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_PORCELAIN_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_PORCELAIN_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_PORCELAIN_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_PORCELAIN_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_potato_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:potato)" > 0
				pp_potato_output_raw < 2.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_potato_output_raw
					divide = 2.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:potato)" > 0
				pp_potato_output_raw < 76
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_potato_output_raw
					subtract = 2.5
					divide = 73.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:potato)" > 0
				pp_potato_output_raw < 210
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_potato_output_raw
					subtract = 76
					divide = 134
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:potato)" > 0
				pp_potato_output_raw < 580
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_potato_output_raw
					subtract = 210
					divide = 370
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:potato)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_POTATO_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_POTATO_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_POTATO_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_POTATO_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_POTATO_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_POTATO_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_POTATO_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_pottery_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:pottery)" > 0
				pp_pottery_output_raw < 0.2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_pottery_output_raw
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:pottery)" > 0
				pp_pottery_output_raw < 0.31
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_pottery_output_raw
					subtract = 0.2
					divide = 0.11
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:pottery)" > 0
				pp_pottery_output_raw < 0.6
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_pottery_output_raw
					subtract = 0.31
					divide = 0.29
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:pottery)" > 0
				pp_pottery_output_raw < 2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_pottery_output_raw
					subtract = 0.6
					divide = 1.4
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:pottery)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_POTTERY_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_POTTERY_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_POTTERY_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_POTTERY_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_POTTERY_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_POTTERY_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_POTTERY_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_rice_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:rice)" > 0
				pp_rice_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_rice_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:rice)" > 0
				pp_rice_output_raw < 1.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_rice_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 0.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:rice)" > 0
				pp_rice_output_raw < 47
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_rice_output_raw
					subtract = 1.5
					divide = 45.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:rice)" > 0
				pp_rice_output_raw < 430
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_rice_output_raw
					subtract = 47
					divide = 383
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:rice)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_RICE_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_RICE_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_RICE_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_RICE_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_RICE_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_RICE_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_RICE_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_saffron_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:saffron)" > 0
				pp_saffron_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_saffron_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:saffron)" > 0
				pp_saffron_output_raw < 2.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_saffron_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 1.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:saffron)" > 0
				pp_saffron_output_raw < 5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_saffron_output_raw
					subtract = 2.5
					divide = 2.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:saffron)" > 0
				pp_saffron_output_raw < 8.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_saffron_output_raw
					subtract = 5
					divide = 3.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:saffron)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SAFFRON_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SAFFRON_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SAFFRON_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SAFFRON_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SAFFRON_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_SAFFRON_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_SAFFRON_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_salt_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:salt)" > 0
				pp_salt_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_salt_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:salt)" > 0
				pp_salt_output_raw < 4
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_salt_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 3
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:salt)" > 0
				pp_salt_output_raw < 16
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_salt_output_raw
					subtract = 4
					divide = 12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:salt)" > 0
				pp_salt_output_raw < 62
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_salt_output_raw
					subtract = 16
					divide = 46
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:salt)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SALT_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SALT_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SALT_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SALT_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SALT_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_SALT_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_SALT_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_saltpeter_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:saltpeter)" > 0
				pp_saltpeter_output_raw < 0.1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_saltpeter_output_raw
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:saltpeter)" > 0
				pp_saltpeter_output_raw < 0.17
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_saltpeter_output_raw
					subtract = 0.1
					divide = 0.07
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:saltpeter)" > 0
				pp_saltpeter_output_raw < 0.8
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_saltpeter_output_raw
					subtract = 0.17
					divide = 0.63
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:saltpeter)" > 0
				pp_saltpeter_output_raw < 2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_saltpeter_output_raw
					subtract = 0.8
					divide = 1.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:saltpeter)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SALTPETER_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SALTPETER_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SALTPETER_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SALTPETER_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SALTPETER_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_SALTPETER_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_SALTPETER_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_sand_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:sand)" > 0
				pp_sand_output_raw < 1.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_sand_output_raw
					divide = 1.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:sand)" > 0
				pp_sand_output_raw < 3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_sand_output_raw
					subtract = 1.5
					divide = 1.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:sand)" > 0
				pp_sand_output_raw < 9
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_sand_output_raw
					subtract = 3
					divide = 6
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:sand)" > 0
				pp_sand_output_raw < 19
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_sand_output_raw
					subtract = 9
					divide = 10
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:sand)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SAND_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SAND_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SAND_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SAND_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SAND_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_SAND_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_SAND_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_silk_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:silk)" > 0
				pp_silk_output_raw < 2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_silk_output_raw
					divide = 2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:silk)" > 0
				pp_silk_output_raw < 3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_silk_output_raw
					subtract = 2
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:silk)" > 0
				pp_silk_output_raw < 4.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_silk_output_raw
					subtract = 3
					divide = 1.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:silk)" > 0
				pp_silk_output_raw < 10
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_silk_output_raw
					subtract = 4.5
					divide = 5.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:silk)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SILK_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SILK_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SILK_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SILK_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SILK_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_SILK_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_SILK_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_silver_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:silver)" > 0
				pp_silver_output_raw < 0.88
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_silver_output_raw
					divide = 0.88
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:silver)" > 0
				pp_silver_output_raw < 2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_silver_output_raw
					subtract = 0.88
					divide = 1.12
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:silver)" > 0
				pp_silver_output_raw < 5.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_silver_output_raw
					subtract = 2
					divide = 3.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:silver)" > 0
				pp_silver_output_raw < 72
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_silver_output_raw
					subtract = 5.5
					divide = 66.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:silver)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SILVER_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SILVER_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SILVER_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SILVER_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SILVER_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_SILVER_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_SILVER_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_slaves_goods_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:slaves_goods)" > 0
				pp_slaves_goods_output_raw < 0.07
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_slaves_goods_output_raw
					divide = 0.07
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:slaves_goods)" > 0
				pp_slaves_goods_output_raw < 0.2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_slaves_goods_output_raw
					subtract = 0.07
					divide = 0.13
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:slaves_goods)" > 0
				pp_slaves_goods_output_raw < 2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_slaves_goods_output_raw
					subtract = 0.2
					divide = 1.8
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:slaves_goods)" > 0
				pp_slaves_goods_output_raw < 4
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_slaves_goods_output_raw
					subtract = 2
					divide = 2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:slaves_goods)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SLAVES_GOODS_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SLAVES_GOODS_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SLAVES_GOODS_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SLAVES_GOODS_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SLAVES_GOODS_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_SLAVES_GOODS_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_SLAVES_GOODS_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_steel_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:steel)" > 0
				pp_steel_output_raw < 2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_steel_output_raw
					divide = 2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:steel)" > 0
				pp_steel_output_raw < 2.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_steel_output_raw
					subtract = 2
					divide = 0.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:steel)" > 0
				pp_steel_output_raw < 4
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_steel_output_raw
					subtract = 2.5
					divide = 1.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:steel)" > 0
				pp_steel_output_raw < 12
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_steel_output_raw
					subtract = 4
					divide = 8
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:steel)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_STEEL_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_STEEL_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_STEEL_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_STEEL_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_STEEL_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_STEEL_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_STEEL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_stone_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:stone)" > 0
				pp_stone_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_stone_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:stone)" > 0
				pp_stone_output_raw < 1.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_stone_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 0.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:stone)" > 0
				pp_stone_output_raw < 3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_stone_output_raw
					subtract = 1.5
					divide = 1.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:stone)" > 0
				pp_stone_output_raw < 31
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_stone_output_raw
					subtract = 3
					divide = 28
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:stone)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_STONE_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_STONE_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_STONE_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_STONE_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_STONE_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_STONE_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_STONE_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_sugar_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:sugar)" > 0
				pp_sugar_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_sugar_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:sugar)" > 0
				pp_sugar_output_raw < 3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_sugar_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:sugar)" > 0
				pp_sugar_output_raw < 5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_sugar_output_raw
					subtract = 3
					divide = 2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:sugar)" > 0
				pp_sugar_output_raw < 14
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_sugar_output_raw
					subtract = 5
					divide = 9
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:sugar)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SUGAR_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SUGAR_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SUGAR_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SUGAR_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SUGAR_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_SUGAR_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_SUGAR_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_tar_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tar)" > 0
				pp_tar_output_raw < 0.25
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_tar_output_raw
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tar)" > 0
				pp_tar_output_raw < 0.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_tar_output_raw
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tar)" > 0
				pp_tar_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_tar_output_raw
					subtract = 0.5
					divide = 0.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tar)" > 0
				pp_tar_output_raw < 7
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_tar_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 6
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tar)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TAR_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TAR_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TAR_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TAR_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TAR_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_TAR_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_TAR_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_tea_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tea)" > 0
				pp_tea_output_raw < 4
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_tea_output_raw
					divide = 4
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tea)" > 0
				pp_tea_output_raw < 5.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_tea_output_raw
					subtract = 4
					divide = 1.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tea)" > 0
				pp_tea_output_raw < 9
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_tea_output_raw
					subtract = 5.5
					divide = 3.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tea)" > 0
				pp_tea_output_raw < 13
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_tea_output_raw
					subtract = 9
					divide = 4
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tea)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TEA_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TEA_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TEA_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TEA_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TEA_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_TEA_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_TEA_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_tin_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tin)" > 0
				pp_tin_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_tin_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tin)" > 0
				pp_tin_output_raw < 1.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_tin_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 0.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tin)" > 0
				pp_tin_output_raw < 3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_tin_output_raw
					subtract = 1.5
					divide = 1.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tin)" > 0
				pp_tin_output_raw < 23
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_tin_output_raw
					subtract = 3
					divide = 20
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tin)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TIN_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TIN_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TIN_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TIN_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TIN_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_TIN_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_TIN_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_tobacco_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tobacco)" > 0
				pp_tobacco_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_tobacco_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tobacco)" > 0
				pp_tobacco_output_raw < 2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_tobacco_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tobacco)" > 0
				pp_tobacco_output_raw < 3.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_tobacco_output_raw
					subtract = 2
					divide = 1.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tobacco)" > 0
				pp_tobacco_output_raw < 10
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_tobacco_output_raw
					subtract = 3.5
					divide = 6.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tobacco)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TOBACCO_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TOBACCO_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TOBACCO_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TOBACCO_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TOBACCO_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_TOBACCO_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_TOBACCO_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_tools_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tools)" > 0
				pp_tools_output_raw < 0.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_tools_output_raw
					divide = 0.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tools)" > 0
				pp_tools_output_raw < 0.52
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_tools_output_raw
