					subtract = 0.5
					divide = 0.02
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tools)" > 0
				pp_tools_output_raw < 1.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_tools_output_raw
					subtract = 0.52
					divide = 0.98
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tools)" > 0
				pp_tools_output_raw < 6
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_tools_output_raw
					subtract = 1.5
					divide = 4.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tools)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TOOLS_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TOOLS_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TOOLS_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TOOLS_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TOOLS_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_TOOLS_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_TOOLS_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_victuals_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:victuals)" > 0
				pp_victuals_output_raw < 6
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_victuals_output_raw
					divide = 6
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:victuals)" > 0
				pp_victuals_output_raw < 9.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_victuals_output_raw
					subtract = 6
					divide = 3.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:victuals)" > 0
				pp_victuals_output_raw < 26
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_victuals_output_raw
					subtract = 9.5
					divide = 16.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:victuals)" > 0
				pp_victuals_output_raw < 71
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_victuals_output_raw
					subtract = 26
					divide = 45
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:victuals)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_VICTUALS_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_VICTUALS_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_VICTUALS_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_VICTUALS_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_VICTUALS_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_VICTUALS_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_VICTUALS_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_weaponry_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:weaponry)" > 0
				pp_weaponry_output_raw < 0.1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_weaponry_output_raw
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:weaponry)" > 0
				pp_weaponry_output_raw < 0.2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_weaponry_output_raw
					subtract = 0.1
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:weaponry)" > 0
				pp_weaponry_output_raw < 0.4
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_weaponry_output_raw
					subtract = 0.2
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:weaponry)" > 0
				pp_weaponry_output_raw < 2
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_weaponry_output_raw
					subtract = 0.4
					divide = 1.6
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:weaponry)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_WEAPONRY_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_WEAPONRY_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_WEAPONRY_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_WEAPONRY_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_WEAPONRY_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_WEAPONRY_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_WEAPONRY_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_wheat_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:wheat)" > 0
				pp_wheat_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:wheat)" > 0
				pp_wheat_output_raw < 4
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 3
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:wheat)" > 0
				pp_wheat_output_raw < 17
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_output_raw
					subtract = 4
					divide = 13
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:wheat)" > 0
				pp_wheat_output_raw < 420
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_output_raw
					subtract = 17
					divide = 403
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:wheat)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_WHEAT_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_WHEAT_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_WHEAT_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_WHEAT_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_WHEAT_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_WHEAT_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_wild_game_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:wild_game)" > 0
				pp_wild_game_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_wild_game_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:wild_game)" > 0
				pp_wild_game_output_raw < 1.5
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_wild_game_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 0.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:wild_game)" > 0
				pp_wild_game_output_raw < 3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_wild_game_output_raw
					subtract = 1.5
					divide = 1.5
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:wild_game)" > 0
				pp_wild_game_output_raw < 73
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_wild_game_output_raw
					subtract = 3
					divide = 70
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:wild_game)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_WILD_GAME_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_WILD_GAME_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_WILD_GAME_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_WILD_GAME_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_WILD_GAME_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_WILD_GAME_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_WILD_GAME_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_wine_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:wine)" > 0
				pp_wine_output_raw < 0.1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_wine_output_raw
					divide = 0.1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:wine)" > 0
				pp_wine_output_raw < 0.3
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_wine_output_raw
					subtract = 0.1
					divide = 0.2
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:wine)" > 0
				pp_wine_output_raw < 0.6
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_wine_output_raw
					subtract = 0.3
					divide = 0.3
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:wine)" > 0
				pp_wine_output_raw < 9
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_wine_output_raw
					subtract = 0.6
					divide = 8.4
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:wine)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_WINE_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_WINE_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_WINE_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_WINE_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_WINE_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_WINE_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_WINE_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_wool_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:wool)" > 0
				pp_wool_output_raw < 1
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				factor = {
					value = pp_wool_output_raw
					divide = 1
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:wool)" > 0
				pp_wool_output_raw < 4
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				factor = {
					value = pp_wool_output_raw
					subtract = 1
					divide = 3
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:wool)" > 0
				pp_wool_output_raw < 73
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_wool_output_raw
					subtract = 4
					divide = 69
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:wool)" > 0
				pp_wool_output_raw < 300
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
				factor = {
					value = pp_wool_output_raw
					subtract = 73
					divide = 227
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:wool)" > 0
			}
			value = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_WOOL_OUTPUT_VERY_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MIN }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_WOOL_OUTPUT_LOW" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_WOOL_OUTPUT_MEDIUM" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MID }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_WOOL_OUTPUT_HIGH" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_WOOL_OUTPUT_CAPPED" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_MAX }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_WOOL_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_WOOL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}
